title: Automatically delete subitems when an item moves to a different group
excerpt: Not the most urgent thing, but it would be super useful if there were a recipe like “when item moves to a group, delete all existing subitems under the item.”

posts.author: Dly215 (Duong )
posts.cookedHtml: Not the most urgent thing, but it would be super useful if there were a recipe like “when item moves to a group, delete all existing subitems under the item.”
